channel.title: PurpleSec
channel.description: Offensive and defensive cybersecurity writeups, vulnerability research, and security blog by Bilash J. Shahi.

item.title: The Great Telegram Lockdown: Exam Leaks, Timestamp Forgery, and the Global War on Moderation
item.description: An in-depth investigation into India's recent temporary ban on Telegram, the technical exploit of timestamp forgery used by exam paper leaking rackets, and the global legal struggles of Pavel Durov.
item.author: elodvk@proton.me (Bilash J. Shahi)

item.title: Deep Dive: CVE-2025-57819 - Critical RCE in Sangoma FreePBX
item.description: A detailed technical breakdown of CVE-2025-57819, an unauthenticated SQL injection and remote code execution vulnerability in Sangoma FreePBX Endpoint Manager.
item.author: elodvk@proton.me (Bilash J. Shahi)

item.title: Deep Dive: BadSuccessor (CVE-2025-53779) — The Windows Server 2025 dMSA Exploit That Shook Active Directory
item.description: The definitive technical analysis of BadSuccessor (CVE-2025-53779). Covers the full history of dMSA, Akamai's discovery, Kerberos PAC mechanics, Microsoft's controversial response, public PoC tools, the Ouroboros persistence technique, SIEM detection rules, and enterprise mitigations.
item.author: elodvk@proton.me (Bilash J. Shahi)

item.title: The Ban on "Foreign Nationals": US Government's Unprecedented Move Against Anthropic's Fable and Mythos Models
item.description: A deep dive into the recent U.S. government export control directive targeting Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models, the global shutdown, and the jailbreak controversy.
item.author: elodvk@proton.me (Bilash J. Shahi)

item.title: Quantum Computing and PKI: The Looming Cryptographic Apocalypse and How to Survive It
item.description: A comprehensive deep dive into how quantum computing threatens to dismantle Public Key Infrastructure (PKI), the backbone of internet security. Covers Shor's and Grover's algorithms, the Harvest Now Decrypt Later threat, NIST's post-quantum standards (ML-KEM, ML-DSA, SLH-DSA), real-world hybrid TLS deployments by Google and Cloudflare, Quantum Key Distribution vs PQC, cryptographic agility, and a practical enterprise migration checklist.
item.author: elodvk@proton.me (Bilash J. Shahi)

item.title: June 2026 Patch Tuesday: A Record-Breaking 206 CVEs, Three Zero-Days & Two BitLocker Bypasses
item.description: A deep-dive into June 2026 Patch Tuesday — the largest in Microsoft history, patching 206 CVEs including 3 zero-days, a wormable Windows Kernel RCE (CVSS 9.8), an actively exploited Defender EoP, and two separate BitLocker bypasses (YellowKey & Bitskrieg).
item.author: elodvk@proton.me (Bilash J. Shahi)

item.title: How GitHub and npm Are Fighting Back Against Supply Chain Attacks — And What You Need to Do Before July 2026
item.description: A deep dive into the npm v12 security overhaul arriving July 2026, the supply chain attacks that forced it, and a practical guide to preparing your projects — covering lifecycle script lockdown, Trusted Publishing, provenance attestations, and lessons from event-stream, colors.js, Shai-Hulud, and the chalk/debug compromise.
item.author: elodvk@proton.me (Bilash J. Shahi)

item.title: NVIDIA RTX Spark & DGX Spark: The Dawn of Personal AI Supercomputers and What It Means for Local LLM Enthusiasts
item.description: An in-depth look at NVIDIA RTX Spark and DGX Spark — the new personal AI supercomputers powered by Grace Blackwell silicon. From the 128GB unified memory architecture to running 200B-parameter models locally, we explore what these machines mean for developers, researchers, and the local LLM community.
item.author: elodvk@proton.me (Bilash J. Shahi)

item.title: The Nightmare Eclipse Zero-Day Campaign: A Complete Technical Analysis of the 2026 Microsoft Vendetta
item.description: The definitive case study on the Nightmare Eclipse zero-day campaign against Microsoft. Covers all 8+ exploits (YellowKey, BlueHammer, RedSun, UnDefend, RoguePlanet, GreatXML), the researcher's identity and motivations, CVE details, patch status, CISA KEV entries, detection strategies, and the broader vulnerability disclosure debate.
item.author: elodvk@proton.me (Bilash J. Shahi)

item.title: To Err is Algorithm: Case Studies Where AI Messed Up Big Time
item.description: A deep dive into three major incidents where artificial intelligence systems failed spectacularly, resulting in financial loss, legal liability, and public relations nightmares.
item.author: elodvk@proton.me (Bilash J. Shahi)

item.title: A Comprehensive Guide to Modern AI: Concepts, Architecture, and Local Deployment
item.description: A comprehensive guide to modern AI, explaining core concepts like LLMs, RAG, embeddings, local deployment, and practical cybersecurity risks.
item.author: elodvk@proton.me (Bilash J. Shahi)

item.title: The Golden Skeleton Key: A Deep Dive into CVE-2026-45585 (YellowKey) BitLocker Bypass
item.description: A comprehensive technical deep dive into CVE-2026-45585 (YellowKey), a critical physical access vulnerability that completely bypasses Microsoft BitLocker encryption.
item.author: elodvk@proton.me (Bilash J. Shahi)

item.title: The Anatomy of the Meta AI Support Hack: Why AI Should Never Reset Passwords
item.description: A deep dive into the 2026 Meta AI support hack, exploring how attackers socially engineered an AI chatbot to bypass IAM and reset Instagram passwords.
item.author: elodvk@proton.me (Bilash J. Shahi)

item.title: How I Conquered the PNPT: A Wild Ride Through Cyber Shenanigans
item.description: A candid review of the Practical Network Penetration Tester (PNPT) exam, featuring tips, lessons learned, and active directory exploitation strategies.
item.author: elodvk@proton.me (Bilash J. Shahi)
